headline: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) have what it takes? Let's find out.
